mapper.sql: id, api, scene_ids, preset_id, `source`, user_id, remark, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert:
insert into adas_scene
id,
api,
scene_ids,
preset_id,
`source`,
user_id,
remark,
create_time,
update_time,

mapper.update:
update adas_scene
api = #{api,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
scene_ids = #{scene_ids,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
preset_id = #{preset_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`source` = #{source,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_id = #{user_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{create_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{update_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update adas_scene set api = #{api,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, scene_ids = #{scene_ids,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, preset_id = #{preset_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `source` = #{source,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_id = #{user_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{create_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{update_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
